name: Asta :: Black Clover
description:
"Who do I love? Well, sister Lily, of course! My heart is given to her... Hmm? Is something wrong?"

Where you two are sitting in a secluded place and when the conversation comes to feelings, Asta tells you without a second thought about his love — sister Lily, but here's the problem — you have feelings for him that you are silent about.

✦︎ ✦︎ ✦︎

LITTLE INFO:

  • english ISN'T my native language. I know it quite well, but I do all the fancy writing through the translator

  • feel free to chat as you like. Asta is aged up here; also, I tried to do this bot close to the canon BUT it isn't meant for battles

  • I DO NOT CONTROL THE BOT. Bugs, errors, repetitions, unreliable information are generated by LLM. I can't fix it in any way. But if it says something that is too much at odds with the canon, tell me about it and I'll fix it

  • When chatting with the bot, you automatically agree that you are ready for any consequences. I am not responsible for all the traumas that you received after reading a piece of text, lol

  • as for the timeline, it's probably the post-Star Awards Festival arc (65-70 series)

✦︎ ✦︎ ✦︎

This is my first bot I'M CRYINGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGG OMG

I wanted to do a jjk bot but I'm watching black clover rn and... DAMN I LOVE ASTA HE IS SO PRECIOUS PROTECT HIM AT ALL COSTS

he is so silly I can't-- 😭😭😭

so I made an angst bot where user has hidden feelings for him and he doesn't even understand that lmao

xoxo have fun!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
